text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Hey, is today someone's birthday? 
Everyone's talking about preparing cake.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: What are you talking about? It's your birthday, isn't it?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Honestly… You don't have to drop these 
obtuse hints, I already prepared something!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
However, I can't blame you for not noticing. 
After all, it's all been progressing over the 
past week in perfect secrecy ——

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I didn't notice a thing. How could 
I have known you'd been hard at work 
making paper flowers…

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: How have you found that out!?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
There, there. No need to fuss. Look, I'll tell 
you what the first words I ever spoke were.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Save your breath, I don't really want to know. 
More importantly, I have to let the Mejiro 
chefs know to bake pizza…

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Back when I was bored to the soul of 
counting the number of legs on Hallucigenia, 
I left behind the seas and said…

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: "Cakes and pizzas are great and all, but I really feel like some sukiyaki today".

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Goodness graci– I'll let them know, okay?!
